summary: Any additional increases beyond the highest level listed

mechanics.name_guess: Any additional increases beyond the highest level listed
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 024 > npcs > Any additional increases beyond the highest level listed
mechanics.excerpt: Any additional increases beyond the highest level listed not count, unless the trait can be obtained twice_ In this case_ the character receives second time, starting at the lowest level: Attribute Thresholds The life your character leads will influence certain Attributes_ Though you can choose specific Attribute values their cost may be affected by Attribute thresholds listed in the Life Path.
